name: Hardened Docker DooD
overview: Provides a hardened, sterile execution environment for the Sandbox service. If your OpenClaw agent hallucinates a dangerous Python or Bash script, or is tricked via prompt injection into running malicious code, this environment ensures the code cannot escape and compromise your host machine.
details: This provider creates a hardened, sterile execution environment for the Sandbox service. If your OpenClaw agent hallucinates a dangerous Python or Bash script, or is tricked via prompt injection into running malicious code, this environment ensures the code cannot escape and compromise your host machine. By utilizing Docker-out-of-Docker (DooD) principles, the main gateway routes all code execution requests into this isolated container rather than executing them internally.

Security Posture:
* Network Isolation: The sandbox has no access to the internet or your internal openclaw-net Docker network. It cannot exfiltrate data or scan internal ports.
* Capability Dropping: All Linux kernel capabilities are explicitly dropped (cap_drop: ALL).
* No New Privileges: The container is forbidden from gaining new privileges via setuid binaries.
